nasb.text: And Levi gave a big reception for Him in his house; and there was a great crowd of tax collectors and other people who were reclining at the table with them.

esv.text: And Levi made him a great feast in his house, and there was a large company of tax collectors and others reclining at table with them.

cnv.text: 利未在自己家裡，為他大擺筵席，有許多稅吏和別的人一起吃飯。

ccb.text: 随后，他在家设宴款待耶稣，赴宴的人中有许多税吏和其他人。

csbs.text: 利未在自己家里为耶稣预备盛大的宴席，有一大群税吏和其他人与他们一同坐席。
